BKR-01.narration_script: The BAKER Dead Weight Tester is used for fundamental calibration of pressure measuring instruments such as strain gauges and pressure gauges. It works on the principle of balancing a known weight over a calibrated piston area to generate precise pressure.

BKR-02.apparatus: BAKER Linear and Angular Measurement Instruments
BKR-02.narration_script: This setup includes Vernier Calipers, Screw Gauges, Dial Gauges, Height Gauges, and Bevel Protectors for precision dimensional measurement and error analysis.

BKR-03.narration_script: BAKER Limit Gauges demonstrate Goâ€“No Go gauging based on Taylorâ€™s Principle for checking maximum and minimum material conditions.

BKR-04.narration_script: The BAKER Surface Roughness Tester measures surface texture parameters such as Ra using a stylus-based profiling system.

BKR-05.apparatus: BAKER Optical Projector and Tool Makersâ€™ Microscope
BKR-05.narration_script: This apparatus is used for optical inspection and non-contact measurement of tool geometry and small components.

BKR-06.apparatus: BAKER Electrical, Mechanical, Optical and Pneumatic Comparators
BKR-06.narration_script: These comparators are used for detecting small dimensional deviations by comparing test components with master standards.

BKR-07.narration_script: This setup determines modulus of elasticity using strain gauges by measuring resistance variation under applied stress.

BKR-08.apparatus: BAKER Gear Tooth Vernier Caliper and Thermocouple Calibration Setup
BKR-08.narration_script: This setup includes calibration of thermocouples and gear tooth measurements using a Gear Tooth Vernier Caliper.

BKR-09.apparatus: BAKER Stroboscope and Speed Pickup Calibration Setup
BKR-09.narration_script: This setup measures and calibrates rotational speed using stroboscopic light pulses and magnetic/photo pickups.

BKR-10.narration_script: This apparatus is used for flow rate calibration using anemometers and ultrasonic flow meters, including RPN analysis for risk evaluation.

BKR-11.narration_script: The BAKER CMM verifies geometric tolerances using coordinate-based 3D measurement as per ISO 10360-5:2020.

BKR-12.apparatus: BAKER Digital Metrology and Scilab Application Station
BKR-12.narration_script: This station integrates measurement data with computational tools like Scilab for digital metrology analysis and calculator/app development.
